name: Ubaydullah ibn Yazid
title: Devoted Basran Brother
shortDescription: Another son of Yazid ibn Thubayt who, along with his father and brother Zayd, rushed to help the Master of Martyrs on Ashura and was martyred.
fullStory:
Ubaydullah ibn Yazid ibn Thubayt al-Abdi was Zayd's brother and Yazid ibn Thubayt's son from Basra. He too was raised in the school of Wilayah.

Ubaydullah, along with his father and brother, endured the hardships of escaping Basra and crossing the deserts to reach Imam Hussain's (AS) caravan.

In the desert of Karbala, Ubaydullah, alongside his brother and father, portrayed a display of family loyalty. On Ashura, he manfully entered the battlefield.

Finally, after a brave fight, his pure blood was spilled defending the truth. The infallible Imam has honored his name in the Ziyarat al-Nahiya al-Muqaddasa.
quoteArabic: السَّلامُ عَلَى عُبَيْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ يَزِيدَ بْنِ ثُبَيْتٍ...
quote: (Ziyarat al-Nahiya:) Peace be upon Ubaydullah ibn Yazid ibn Thubayt...
